## Analyzers (1)

*Enrich observables with intelligence*

### [Abuse Finder v3.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Abuse_Finder)
Find abuse contacts associated with domain names, URLs, IPs and email addresses.

- **Author:** CERT-BDF
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`, `fqdn`, `url`, `mail`
